chapter_question: How does Cartan exterior calculus rebuild differential geometry?
inspection_targets: Frames, connection forms, and curvature forms form one workflow.
A moving frame records how the tangent basis turns.
The two structural equations organize torsion and curvature.
Cartan forms also read spacetime curvature.

source_span.focus: Applies Cartan's exterior calculus to differential geometry, recovering curvature formulas and extending them to n-manifolds and Schwarzschild spacetime.
source_span.label: Chapter 38
source_span.title: Differential Geometry via Forms
topics: Six fundamental form equations of a surface
Geometric meanings of symmetry and Gauss equations
Metric curvature formula and Theorema Egregium via forms
Curvature 2-forms, Bianchi identities, and Schwarzschild curvature
